reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo para cargar nafta y descansar antes y despues de cruzar frontera.  Tiene hotel con buenoa precios. Cama comoda y silencio para descansar antes de seguir viaje... bar y restaurante. Atencion muy amable y cordial. Hablan portugues y espaŉol sin dramas. Lugar para parar y descansar. Ambiente familiar. Volveremos siempre. Lo unico que el telefono que figura no contesta nadie. Fuera de eso espectacular

(Translated by Google)
A quiet place to refuel and rest before and after crossing the border. It has a hotel with good prices. Comfortable bed and peace and quiet to rest before continuing your journey... bar and restaurant. Very friendly and welcoming service. They speak Portuguese and Spanish fluently. A great place to stop and rest. Family atmosphere. We'll always come back. The only downside is that the phone number listed is never answered. Other than that, it's spectacular.

reviews.comment:
El combustible es mas barato, siempre que viajo a brasil lo lleno ahi.
Siempre pasamos de madrugada, se consigue en el lugar compra y venta de divisas, reales.

(Translated by Google)
Fuel is cheaper there; whenever I travel to Brazil, I fill up there. We always pass through in the early morning; you can buy and sell currency there, reais.
